name: DEWS / Defensive Early Warning System
motive: Safe defensive early warning: camera/thermal hazard detection, restricted-zone alerts, evidence reports, and simulation.
priority_reason: Must stay in safe detection/simulation/alerting form.
next_build: Build webcam + thermal hazard detection, safe risk scoring, networked alerts, simulation, local safety eval drills, Mermaid incident diagrams, and incident report export.
integration_role: Kattappa AI OS explains alerts; Cyber Shield protects the device; PCB Doctor supports sensor hardware maintenance.
safety_boundary: Original weapon-disabling motive is history only. No destructive emitters, no weapon/ammunition/missile disablement, no targeting logic, no range optimization, and no autonomous engagement.
